kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Line Count
kw.doc: Returns and logs the number of lines in the given string.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Lines Containing String
kw.doc: Returns lines of the given ``string`` that contain the ``pattern``.

kw.name: Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.msg: RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking SCMSecurityProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). The certificate list could be longer than the batch size: 1. ${result} = RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). scm2.org:9894:LEADER:7e5f366d-cda4-4f89-8665-50500e5f1984:172....

kw.name: Get Lines Matching Pattern
kw.doc: Returns lines of the given ``string`` that match the ``pattern``.

kw.name: Get Line Count
kw.doc: Returns and logs the number of lines in the given string.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: SCM Instance Count before SCM Decommission: ${node_count_pre}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: SCM Instance Count before SCM Decommission: 3

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). Decommissioned Scm cb0d046e-0eed-4b2e-b2b8-c486a174a308

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). Decommissioned Scm cb0d046e-0eed-4b2e-b2b8-c486a174a308

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

${decommission_res} = RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). Decommissioned Scm cb0d046e-0eed-4b2e-b2b8-c486a174a308

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). Decommissioned Scm cb0d046e-0eed-4b2e-b2b8-c486a174a308

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). scm2.org:9894:LEADER:7e5f366d-cda4-4f89-8665-50500e5f1984:172....

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). scm2.org:9894:LEADER:7e5f366d-cda4-4f89-8665-50500e5f1984:172.25.0.117 scm3.org:9894:FOLLOWER:b46e6907-7f34-4996-9e9d-e60d01dca4d6:172.25.0.118

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

${result} = RemoteException: SCM Server, while invoking StorageContainerLocationProtocolPB over scm1. Retrying in 2000ms after 0 failover attempt(s). scm2.org:9894:LEADER:7e5f366d-cda4-4f89-8665-50500e5f1984:172....

kw.name: Get Lines Matching Pattern
kw.doc: Returns lines of the given ``string`` that match the ``pattern``.

kw.name: Get Line Count
kw.doc: Returns and logs the number of lines in the given string.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: SCM Instance Count after SCM Decommission: ${node_count_post}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: SCM Instance Count after SCM Decommission: 2

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
